title: Burning
tmdbOverview: Deliveryman Jong-su is out on a job when he runs into Hae-mi, a girl who once lived in his neighborhood. She asks if he'd mind looking after her cat while she's away on a trip to Africa. On her return, she introduces to Jong-su an enigmatic young man named Ben, who she met during her trip. One day Ben tells Jong-su about his most unusual hobby.
synopsis: Released in 2018, Burning is a mystery, drama and thriller film from South Korea and Japan. It holds a solid 7.4 rating on IMDb. A standout of 2010s cinema, it earns its spot on our lists. It carries a R certification (US rating system) — see the film's page for parental details.
